translations.en: a burly barbarian warrior.
"Vy talk ven dere's fighting to do?"
translations.note: 日耳曼口音（v→w, d→th）譯為質樸豪邁

translations.en: "Ho, Avatar, thou hast returned!"
"Hail, $P! I haf heard of thy deeds, Avatar!"
"I be named Gorn, $G."
translations.note: I be 為口語，用「俺」呈現粗獷感

translations.en: "I follow thee, $G. I haf no other job now."
translations.zh: 「俺跟著汝，$G。俺現在沒別的差事了。」

translations.en: "I be a fighter, a homeless vanderer."
translations.zh: 「俺是個武士，無家可歸的流浪者。」

translations.en: "Here I vait until I find somevun else to @trafel mit."
translations.zh: 「俺在這等著，等找到別人一起@trafel（旅行）。」

translations.en: "Ya, I like to trafel!"
"Much vould I like to vander again, but I haf no vun to trafel mit now."
translations.zh: 「俺很想再度闖蕩，但現在沒人跟俺一起旅行了。」

translations.en: "Somevun vill ask me to @join mit them zooner or later."
"I don't understand, $G. Vat do you mean, $Z?"
"It is alvays a pleasure to talk mit thee, $G."
translations.zh: 「和汝說話，$G，每回都是一種享受。」

translations.en: "Sutek is mad."
"He is very dangerous."
"I vould avoid him if I vere thee."
"But he does know many tings, und is sometimes helpful."
translations.zh: 「但他確實知道許多事，有時也是有用的。」

translations.en: "I am just a simple varrior, $G, and know nothing about $Z."
translations.zh: 「俺只是個粗人武士，$G，對$Z一無所知。」

translations.en: "Surely zere are others who vould know more about $Z than I, $G."
"I vould be much happy to join mit thee, $G$0"
translations.note: $0為引擎注入的附加條件字串

translations.en: "But I vas here first, ya?"
"Ask ven ve land, okay?"
"Ok, if that's vat you vant. Maybe I'll zee you later."
translations.zh: 「好吧，若那是汝所願。也許晚些見。」

translations.en: "You keep all zis stuff meanwhile, ya?"
, but ve are at sea!
translations.note: 引擎注入的附加條件片段

translations.en: , but I dislike such large groups.
translations.note: 引擎注入的附加條件片段

translations.en: , und I already haf!

translator_notes: 葛爾恩是日耳曼口音蠻族武士。英文中 v→w、d→th、z→s/th 等音替換，中文以「俺」＋質樸豪邁語氣呈現其粗獷個性。
